situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete (audit-2026-07-03-007 all fixes settled). Triggered new full audit per protocol. Selected engine-skills-extracted/runtime-core — previous audit (audit-2026-07-03-006) only covered archive snapshot integrity, never runtime behavior of the decision→execute→protect→feedback loop scripts.
action: Deep-read 8 core runtime scripts (autonomous-loop.sh, triage.py, pipeline-gate.py, autonomous-commit-gate.py, stop-completion-gate.py, studio-precheck.sh, distill-patterns.py, auto-commit.py). Compared each against live AS versions via diff. Inspected _manifest.json checksum claims. Cross-referenced prior audit findings for regression tracking.
outcome_evidence: Produced .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-04-012.md with 7 findings (2H/2M/2L/1I). Updated audit-cycle-state.json: status=fix-in-progress, 6 derived_fixes pending, current_audit_id=audit-2026-07-04-012. Updated autonomous-state.md with new LAST_UPDATED/NEXT_SUGGESTION. Key findings verified by direct diff output showing archive-live divergence in 3 script pairs.
next_suggestion: [1] Dispatch ESE-RT-H02: fix studio-precheck.sh shell injection (live regressed vs archive env-var approach). [2] Dispatch ESE-RT-H01: merge ESE-M02 timeout/max-turns into live autonomous-loop.sh. [3] Dispatch ESE-RT-M01: backport SCRIPTS-L04 exception narrowing to archive distill-patterns.py.

audit_findings.finding: Live version uses $CAL_FILE shell interpolation inside python heredoc (shell injection vector); archive uses safer os.environ['CAL_FILE']. Live regressed relative to archive.
audit_findings.remediation: Replace live studio-precheck.sh with archive env-var approach for CAL_FILE and STATUS_FILE python invocations.

audit_findings.finding: Archive contains ESE-M02 fix (--max-turns/ROUND_TIMEOUT env vars, lines 113-136) but live AS version lacks it entirely. Manifest claims live_md5_match=true but diff shows 30+ lines diverged.
audit_findings.remediation: Merge archive ESE-M02 changes into live autonomous-studio/scripts/autonomous-loop.sh. Regenerate manifest checksums.

audit_findings.finding: Archive retains bare 'except Exception' in load_json_robust and subprocess handler. Live narrowed to explicit exception tuples (SCRIPTS-L04). Archive lags behind live hardening.
audit_findings.remediation: Backport live SCRIPTS-L04 exception narrowing into archive distill-patterns.py copy.

audit_findings.finding: Manifest live_md5_match:true for autonomous-loop.sh contradicted by actual diff. extraction_timestamp 2026-07-03T12:21:52Z predates ESE-M02 fix application at ~12:35Z. Post-fix manifest regeneration missing from packaging workflow.
audit_findings.remediation: Register as structural debt SD-ESE-001. Add post-fix manifest regeneration step to ESE packaging workflow.

audit_findings.finding: Push origin runs unconditionally after successful commit. autonomous_active marker checked at function entry (L325) but not re-checked before push (L394). Race window if marker created during commit processing.
audit_findings.remediation: Re-check .autonomous_active marker before executing push origin.

audit_findings.finding: Block reason printed to both stderr (JSON for Claude Code hook protocol) AND stdout (plain text). Stdout output leaks into conversation context as noise.
audit_findings.remediation: Remove stdout print(reason) on line 228. Stderr JSON already carries the reason.
